name: GitHub: Branch Protection Rules - No Status Checks Required
query:
MATCH p=(:GH_BranchProtectionRule {requires_status_checks: false})-[:GH_ProtectedBy]->(:GH_Branch)
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
description: Finds branches where CI/CD status checks are not required before merging. Code with failing tests or security scans can be merged into protected branches.
